item.title: Version 0.4.18
item.description:
Voce 0.4.18

  • Redesigns the live transcription overlay with a softer glass treatment and a cleaner success pop after insertions
  • Adds a dedicated Reposition Overlay flow so you can move the bubble intentionally without blocking clicks in the app underneath
  • Fixes overlay positioning regressions around persistence, programmatic movement, and click-through behavior

item.title: Version 0.4.16
item.description:
Voce 0.4.16

  • Switches live preview to Apple Speech while keeping Moonshine for final transcription, so long dictation starts immediately and no longer hard-stops when streaming falls behind
  • Adds rolling background finalization with overlap-aware, silence-aware chunking to reduce stop-time processing delays while preserving a full-file recovery path
  • Adds recovery diagnostics and Settings visibility for seam quality and fallback reasons, so transcription issues are easier to detect and tune

item.title: Version 0.4.15
item.description:
Voce 0.4.15

  • Hands-free dictation can now end and submit with Return as an optional setting, so click-to-start capture works better in chat boxes and command bars

item.title: Version 0.4.14
item.description:
Voce 0.4.14

  • Hold-to-talk now supports real modifier chords such as Control+Option, which reduces accidental recordings when one modifier is part of another shortcut
  • Fixes stale permission warnings on the record screen so already-granted microphone and accessibility access no longer show as missing
  • Makes media pause and resume behavior smoother during quick dictation starts and stops

item.title: Version 0.4.13
item.description:
Voce 0.4.13

  • Settings now save automatically as soon as you make changes
  • Removes the separate Save & Apply step so changes are harder to miss
  • Keeps settings changes in sync with the app immediately while preserving safe deferred runtime updates during active transcription

item.title: Version 0.4.12
item.description:
Voce 0.4.12

  • Removes the broken Base Streaming preset from Voce's model picker because Moonshine's CDN no longer serves its files
  • Automatically migrates saved Base and Base Streaming selections to Small Streaming so existing installs recover cleanly
  • Prevents new model downloads from failing on adapter.ort with an upstream 404 path

item.title: Version 0.4.11
item.description:
Voce 0.4.11

  • Added a scenic frosted-glass app shell with refreshed record-screen visuals and updated app icon artwork
  • Added click-to-capture hands-free hotkey selection with support for modifier-style keys like Globe/Fn
  • Reworked settings into a sidebar layout with clearer model guidance and more actionable permission deep links
  • Hardened long live dictation by bounding the Moonshine audio backlog and surfacing an explicit overload stop message

item.title: Version 0.4.10
item.description:
Voce 0.4.10

  • Makes push-to-talk finalization much more robust so the ends of phrases are less likely to be clipped
  • Preserves meaning-bearing endings during cleanup and removes accidental adjacent repeated phrase runs
  • Simplifies the live overlay to a single transcript-focused pill and adds a toggle for keeping the model warmed in memory

item.title: Version 0.4.9
item.description:
Voce 0.4.9

  • Fixes clipped live dictation endings by using real audio buffer timing and a short speech-aware release tail before finalizing Moonshine

item.title: Version 0.4.8
item.description:
Voce 0.4.8

  • Fixes the disabled "Check for Updates" state by shipping the correct Sparkle configuration in the app bundle
  • Enables automatic background update checks by default

item.title: Version 0.4.7
item.description:
Voce 0.4.7

  • Improves live dictation stop handling so the final words are less likely to be clipped when you release push-to-talk
  • Waits for captured audio and final transcript updates to settle before insertion

item.title: Version 0.4.6
item.description:
Voce 0.4.6

  • Preserves unsaved settings drafts when switching tabs or collapsing settings groups
  • Fixes the "Last transcript" actions to use the current transcript immediately after dictation finishes
  • Improves desktop readability with denser adaptive backgrounds and overlay surfaces

item.title: Version 0.4.5
item.description:
Voce 0.4.5

  • Fixed live Moonshine dictation for Bluetooth microphones by preserving each microphone's native sample rate instead of resampling in-app before streaming
  • Preloaded and reused the active Moonshine transcriber so repeat recordings start faster
  • Updated the app icon artwork and improved the dictation overlay's input anchoring heuristics

item.title: Version 0.4.3
item.description:
Voce 0.4.3

  • Reworked live Moonshine microphone streaming to feed audio to the stream immediately instead of batching it through the custom timer queue
  • Empty live captures now show a visible error instead of silently creating blank transcript history entries

item.title: Version 0.4.2
item.description:
Voce 0.4.2

  • Fixed Sparkle update checks by supplying the appcast URL from code when the generated Info.plist omits SUFeedURL

item.title: Version 0.4.1
item.description:
Voce 0.4.1

  • Fixed recording startup to surface microphone permission failures instead of appearing ready without capturing audio
  • Fixed Moonshine streaming stop/finalization so buffered audio is flushed and transcription errors are not silently dropped
  • Fixed model readiness checks to validate the configured Moonshine model directory correctly

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
Voce 0.4.0

  • Renamed from Murmur to Voce (from Sotto Voce)
  • New bundle identifier: io.voceapp.voce
  • All features from v0.3.0 carry forward

item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description:
Voce 0.3.0

  • Voice commands: say "period", "new line", "delete that" and more — plus custom commands
  • Context-aware filler removal: "you know the answer" is kept, filler "you know" is removed
  • Adaptive learning engine that improves accuracy the more you use it
  • Auto-lexicon: corrections you make repeatedly get learned automatically
  • Snippet suggestions: frequently repeated phrases are suggested as shortcuts
  • Per-app style suggestions: Voce learns your dictation style in each app
  • Vocabulary-biased ranking: your common words and jargon are prioritized

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description:
Voce 0.2.0

  • Replaced Whisper backend with Moonshine for faster, smaller, local transcription
  • Live streaming transcription — see text appear in the overlay as you speak
  • Automatic model download from Moonshine CDN on first launch
  • Added Sparkle for automatic update checking
